name: Cass
description: A courier in fingerless gloves crouched by a chained-up bike, eyeing a path through the stalled cars, an empty delivery satchel still slung across her back.
background: Bike messenger who knew every alley and service door in the downtown core before the streets seized up.
personality: Wiry, quick, and allergic to sitting still — she thinks in shortcuts.
secret: She never made her last drop — a letter to a house she reached too late — and can't decide whether to burn it or keep carrying it.
notes: T45 · Downtown. Skill: navigation/routes. Hook: her mental map of the city is real FR-NPC-06 location knowledge; the undelivered letter is a small personal thread.
